statement.headerDoc:
Problem 013 — C8 Iterate-Bound Theorem (full Lean 4 closure)

  Builds on STEP 866 (Step866C8LTEOneLiner):
    - v2_chain_step_general  : for odd n, v₂(syrOne n + 1) = v₂(n+1) - 1
    - v2_chain_strict_decrease
    - syrOne_odd_of_v2_one

  This file adds the two missing pieces:

    (1) bridge_3n1_vs_n1  — the mod-4 characterization
          Odd n → (v₂(3n+1) ≥ 2 ↔ v₂(n+1) = 1)

    (2) v2_one_chain_terminates — the full iterate-bound theorem
          For odd n, ∃ k ≤ v₂(n+1), v₂(3·syrOne^[k] n + 1) ≥ 2

  Together these close Problem 013 (rei-unsolved-problems #013), which was
  left as a

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
